creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Thank you for following up on this issue and determining that the problem 
is caused by freebsd-update.  It appears that this PR is somewhat related 
to this problem, and it has been open for a while: 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=bin/165954
